carried_forward_findings.description: Production Python package (spectrum_systems/study_runner/) and root run_study.py script violate the architecture boundary stated in CLAUDE.md. Flagged in RC-1 (2026-03-15 audit), A-1 (2026-03-15 governance audit), and GA-008 (2026-03-14 governance review). spectrum_systems/ is currently an evaluation scaffold; pending relocation to a dedicated implementation repo. See docs/implementation-boundary.md.
carried_forward_findings.resolution_note: spectrum_systems/ is designated an evaluation scaffold pending relocation. The implementation-boundary.md document has been updated to make this status explicit. Mechanical enforcement via boundary CI extension (A-3) is required to close this finding. Closure verification (2026-03-17): Designated Deferred — spectrum_systems/ formally documented as evaluation scaffold in docs/implementation-boundary.md and DECISIONS.md Decision 5. Full removal gated on relocation to dedicated implementation repo.

carried_forward_findings.description: Artifact boundary CI enforces data artifact rules only (file extensions, size). It does not enforce the implementation code boundary and does not flag spectrum_systems/ or run_study.py.
carried_forward_findings.resolution_note: Boundary CI extension is tracked as action A-3. Not addressed in this documentation sprint; enforcement logic is out of scope for Prompt C.

carried_forward_findings.description: contracts/governance-declaration.template.json did not exist; downstream repos had no machine-readable format for declaring governance obligations.
carried_forward_findings.resolution_note: contracts/governance-declaration.template.json was published as the Phase 1 activation artifact (2026-03-16). Phase 1 status updated to Initiated in docs/governance-enforcement-roadmap.md. ADR-006 and ADR-007 document the governance manifest model and Phase 1 strategy.

carried_forward_findings.description: Production implementation code in spectrum_systems/ constitutes a self-governance failure — the repo states it should not contain production code but does.
carried_forward_findings.resolution_note: spectrum_systems/ is designated an evaluation scaffold in docs/implementation-boundary.md. Full removal is a follow-up action (A-1) gated on relocation to a dedicated implementation repo. DECISIONS.md updated with Decision 5 documenting the boundary resolution. Closure verification (2026-03-17): Designated Deferred — spectrum_systems/ formally documented as evaluation scaffold in docs/implementation-boundary.md and DECISIONS.md Decision 5. Full removal gated on relocation to dedicated implementation repo.

carried_forward_findings.description: Artifact boundary CI enforces data artifact rules but not the implementation code boundary. spectrum_systems/ passes CI unchallenged.
carried_forward_findings.resolution_note: Same root cause as RC-2. Boundary CI extension (action A-3) required. Out of scope for this documentation sprint.

resolution_notes: Prompt C (2026-03-16) addressed documentation and ADR gaps: created ADR-006 (governance manifest model), ADR-007 (Phase 1 enforcement strategy), ADR-008 (schema authority designation); updated docs/implementation-boundary.md with production-code boundary resolution and spectrum_systems/ evaluation scaffold status; added Decision 5 to DECISIONS.md; created docs/reviews/review-registry.md markdown table; added carried_forward_findings tracking to this registry entry. Closure verification (2026-03-17): A-1 (governance-declaration.template.json), A-2 (Phase 1 roadmap update), A-4 (schema authority designation), A-5 (policy engine wired to CI), A-6 (conformance checklist expanded), A-7 (ADR-006/007/008 created) are all Resolved. A-3 (boundary CI extension to detect implementation code) remains Open — critical blocker. RC-1/GA-008 (production code in spectrum_systems/) are Deferred with formal governance exemption documented. Review remains In Progress pending A-3 completion.
scope: Deep architecture and governance review: governance completeness, cross-repo constitutional strength, review culture, operational readiness, artifact and contract quality, CI/automation enforcement. 10 findings (2 critical, 3 high, 2 medium, 3 low); 7 actions generated. Artifacts delivered: contracts/governance-declaration.template.json (Phase 1 initiated), docs/governance-enforcement-roadmap.md (Phase 1 marked Initiated), docs/governance-conformance-checklist.md (5 new items), schemas/README.md (schema authority designation), CONTRACTS.md (schema authority cross-reference).
